impact: This restores autonomous progress without touching stalled DevHub domain implementation: the next daemon cycles can improve stale calling_llm recovery, syntax-preflight proposal rejection, and compact failure diagnostics under daemon/test scope before retrying blocked PP&D feature tasks.
summary: Append a new narrow daemon-repair tranche to the PP&D task board so the supervisor has independent selectable work after the blocked-only state.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 10 task(s) are blocked and no independent selectable task remains: Task checkbox-19: Task checkbox-178: Add a fixture-only DevHub draft-readiness decision matrix plus focused validation that combines missing facts, redacted file placeholders, selector confidence, upload-readiness gates, fee notices, and exact-confirmation defaults while refusing official actions.; Task checkbox-20: Task checkbox-182: Add daemon diagnostics coverage proving repeated non-JSON LLM responses for a blocked task are persisted with target task, failure kind, compact raw-response summary, and a next-action hint before the worker exits.; Task checkbox-21: Task checkbox-186: Add daemon retry-scope coverage proving that after two syntax_preflight failures on checkbox-178, the next prompt permits either one parser-bearing file or one daemon repair file, and rejects source-plus-fixture-plus-test bundles.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
